sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pasian geelsa hong tunga, lia le tang kigawmna;
Itna tawh pumkhat suak ding, khuk din uh, Na
Kamciamna kip la uh aa, Amau khutte kilen;
Pasian gawmsa a amaute, mite in khen kei

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Nangma thupha namkim tawh, lungnopna guanta in;
Inn sung, phung sung kilemna, kipatna suak uh hen;
suakin, limpha lak den uh hen.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Topa aw, hih nupate, thupha tampi pia in;
tawi uh hen la, Neih le lam cingsak in.
Upna, lawpna kip nei-in, Nang sung lungkim uh hen;
kum uh sawt henla, tawntung kha kihual hen.
